name: opl-flow
description: OPL Flow is a pragmatic Codex workflow profile for direct answers, inline execution, durable evidence, risk-based verification, subagent boundaries, completion audits, and OPL App Full/Superpowers compatibility.

interface.longDescription: OPL Flow packages a reusable Codex-first workflow compatible with OPL App Full and Superpowers: Direct/Inline/Durable task tiers, planner/executor/debugger/verifier role prompts, risk-based evidence selection, high-risk Codex ops routing, subagent dispatch contracts, durable writeback rules, and completion audits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OPL Flow to route Direct/Inline/Durable, use risk-based evidence, and verify before completion.
